cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where a project manager in a software company made a costly mistake that delayed the project. The manager can either take the blame and risk their job or blame a junior team member who was following their instructions. Let me break this down. First, the manager made the mistake. But the junior team member was following their instructions. So maybe the mistake was due to the manager's oversight or error in giving instructions.
